![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/x4ajwxbj/fernbank_afterdark_subpagemarquee.jpg)

## Fernbank After Dark

Offered the second Friday of each month, Fernbank After Dark presents a variety of unique after-hours experiences for grown-ups, including museum exhibits, live music, full bars, tapas menus, science demonstrations and more.

Exclusively for ages 21 and over, Fernbank After Dark is a unique date night for couples, a great place to meet up with friends and a fun experience for travelers. Each month highlights a different science theme and features a variety of fun and immersive programming.

Looking for more fun after the sun goes down? Check out [Museum Nights](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/events/museum-nights/ "Museum Nights") for more events.

### **Upcoming Fernbank After Dark Events\***

![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/svfhecee/jtp_2332.jpg)

**Fernbank After Dark: Booze & Botanicals**

Friday, April 10, 2026 \| 7 - 11 p.m.

Spring is in the air…and so is the booze. Join us for _Booze & Botanicals,_ where cocktails flow, science gets spirited, and your inner botanist is ready to bloom. Mix, muddle, and discover — because who says learning can't come with a garnish? Come thirsty, _leaf_ enlightened.

[**GET TICKETS**](https://1773.blackbaudhosting.com/1773/tickets?tab=2&txobjid=eda3f166-89ed-4c64-b34f-a148d3655b84)

![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/4gtddqnf/jtp_2376.jpg)

**Fernbank After Dark: Buzzed**

Friday, May 8, 2026 \| 7 - 11 p.m.

Things are about to get a little… buzzed. We are diving into the tiny creatures that keep our planet humming—while you enjoy drinks that pack their own sting.  Explore the museum after hours, sip on buzz-worthy beverages, and discover the surprisingly intoxicating world of insects.  Don't miss our outdoor experience [WildWoods](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/experiences/exhibits/outdoor-exhibits/wildwoods/ "WildWoods") and the exhibit [Flight of Butterflies](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/experiences/exhibits/special-exhibits/flight-of-butterflies/ "Flight of Butterflies") before you flutter home!

[**GET TICKETS**](https://1773.blackbaudhosting.com/1773/tickets?tab=2&txobjid=c323b5f0-85e6-488f-bec7-4ca4bed3664c)

![](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/media/bciflaft/jtp_2537.jpg)

**Fernbank After Dark: Game Changers**

Friday, June 12, 2026 \| 7 - 11 p.m.

Ready, set… science! At Game Changers, we are breaking down the science behind sports, strategy and sweat. Explore the museum after hours, grab a cold drink, and get in the game—because at Fernbank, science is always a slam dunk.

[**GET TICKETS**](https://1773.blackbaudhosting.com/1773/page.aspx?pid=196&tab=2&txobjid=0b0a0c56-b243-44dd-a0c0-384bf8ac19d8)

* * *

Sign up for the [Fernbank After Dark e-newsletter](https://www.fernbankmuseum.org/sign-up-for-e-news/) for updates.

### **Know Before You Go**

- While the fun is unlimited, parking is not. We recommend Uber, Lyft or a Taxi to join the party.
- Please drink responsibly.
- Tickets are non-refundable. Date changes are subject to a $2 per ticket transfer fee.

\*All events and activities are subject to change.

Fernbank is a nonprofit natural history museum, giant screen theater and old-growth forest, and is not affiliated with Fernbank Science Center, which operates as a division of DeKalb County Schools.
